}

      "badge": "New",                            // Optional
      "sort_order": 1,                           // Optional
      "is_active": true                          // Optional
    }
  ]
}

request.description:
Upload a single image file

**Form Data:**
- file (type: File) - Select an image file (JPG, PNG, GIF, WebP)

**Constraints:**
- Max size: 5MB
- Supported: JPEG, PNG, GIF, WebP

Upload multiple image files in one request

**Form Data:**
- files (type: File) - Select 1-50 image files

**Constraints:**
- Max per file: 5MB
- Max total: 50MB
- Max files: 50

Upload a single image file

**Form Data:**
- file (type: File) - Select an image file (JPG, PNG, GIF, WebP)

**Constraints:**
- Max size: 5MB
- Supported: JPEG, PNG, GIF, WebP

Upload multiple image files in one request

**Form Data:**
- files (type: File) - Select 1-50 image files

**Constraints:**
- Max per file: 5MB
- Max total: 50MB
- Max files: 50

Get information about an uploaded file

**URL Params:**
- :filename - Filename to get info about

**Returns:**
- url
- filename
- size
- originalName

Delete a file by its filename/ID

**URL Params:**
- :id - Filename to delete (from upload response)

**Example:**
- http://localhost:3000/api/v1/upload/image-1718286400000-123456789.jpg

Delete a file using path query parameter

**Query Params:**
- path - Full or relative path to file

**Examples:**
- /uploads/filename.jpg
- filename.jpg

    "full_name": "Ammar Ali", // Optional
    "delivery_type": "home_delivery", // Required → Enum: home_delivery / store_pickup
    "shipping_address_id": 7, // Optional (if already saved address)
    // OR create new shipping address
    "shipping_address": {
        "full_name": "Ammar Ali", // Required if new address
        "phone": "+1 (240) 555-0123", // Required
        "email": "rajaammarali2003@gmail.com", // Optional
        "address_line1": "1234 Baltimore Avenue", // Required
        "address_line2": "Suite 200", // Optional
        "city": "Hyattsville", // Required
        "state": "MD", // Optional
        "postal_code": "20782", // Optional
        "country": "United States" // Optional (default)
    },
    "billing_address_id": 7, // Optional
    "items": [ // Required - At least 1 item
        {
            "product_id": 42, // Required
            "variant_id": 15, // Optional
            "quantity": 2, // Required
            "print_method": "dtf", // Optional → Enum: dtf, dtg, embroidery, screen_print, sublimation, uv_dtf, vinyl

                101,
                102
            ] // Optional (array of design upload IDs)
        }
    ],
    "coupon_code": "SUMMER25", // Optional
    "pickup_location_id": 1, // Required only if delivery_type = store_pickup
    "notes": "Please deliver between 10 AM - 2 PM" // Optional
}

{
    "page": 1, //  optional - Page number (default: 1)
    "limit": 10, //  optional - Records per page (default: 10)
    "filters": { //  optional - All filter fields are optional
        "id": 1, //  optional - Filter by shipment ID
        "order_id": 1, //  optional - Filter by order ID
        "courier_id": 1, //  optional - Filter by courier ID
        "shipment_number": "SHIP-2026-001", //  optional - Filter by shipment number
        "tracking_number": "1Z1234567890", //  optional - Filter by tracking number
        "provider_shipment_id": "UPS-123", //  optional - Filter by provider shipment ID
        "service_name": "Ground", //  optional - Filter by service name
        "status": "SHIPPED", //  optional - Filter by status (PROCESSING / LABEL_CREATED / SHIPPED / IN_TRANSIT / OUT_FOR_DELIVERY / DELIVERED / FAILED / RETURNED / CANCELLED)
        "is_active": true, //  optional - Filter by active status
        "is_deleted": false //  optional - Filter by deleted status
    },
    "startDate": "2026-06-01", // Global created_at filter
    "endDate": "2026-07-07" // Global created_at filter
}
